Copy-pasteable cairn MCP server snippet for any MCP-compatible client:

{
  "cairn": {
    "command": "cairn",
    "args": ["mcp", "start"]
  }
}

Merge this into your client's MCP config under whatever key it uses for servers.
Phase 0 emits this snippet only. `cairn mcp install claude-code` and `claude-desktop` will write directly in Phase 3.
